description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Snapshots that runs on push to specific branches (master, imgui, WIP-keyboard-stuff) and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix strategy to run a build job on multiple platforms (ubuntu-latest, ubuntu-22.04, macos-12, windows-latest) with different configurations (x86_64, aarch64, unittest, opt). For each job, check out the repository with full history and then perform a build using a custom action.
